experience.name: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications (BUPT)
highlights: Advised by Prof. Chuan Shi and currently conducting research under the guidance of Enmao Diao.
Research interests include graph machine learning, graph foundation models, transformers, and generative modeling.
